TimeEntry.Title: Update for Omnes Diagnostics Website and Hidden Access Page
TimeEntry.Notes: The website has been comprehensively optimized to improve performance, user experience, and search engine visibility. Key upgrades include XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching for faster load times, image compression, and mobile responsiveness. Broken links have been fixed, and internal linking has been enhanced to strengthen site structure and crawl efficiency. Core functionalities have been stabilized by properly configuring essential plugins such as SMTP, contact forms, and Google Tag Manager for accurate tracking and seamless communication. Ongoing KPI monitoring targets crucial metrics like page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and overall search visibility. Continuous technical SEO improvements are being made, addressing crawl errors, refining site architecture, and boosting indexing performance. A strategic growth plan includes persona-based keyword targeting, high-quality SEO content creation, media optimization, and maintaining consistent design standards. Further recommendations include updating business information, strengthening brand alignment, and increasing customer reviews to enhance trust and local SEO performance.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a thorough SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush. This involved analyzing technical aspects, identifying issues affecting site performance, and uncovering optimization opportunities. I reviewed key site health metrics, such as crawl errors, indexing status, and overall website structure. The audit aimed to improve search engine visibility, enhance user experience, and ensure the site adheres to best SEO practices for better rankings and performance.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a thorough SEO audit for the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush, assessing site health, keyword rankings, and technical performance. I analyzed on-page factors, identified critical SEO issues like broken links, slow page load times, and mobile responsiveness problems. Enhance user experience, and optimize the site for better search engine rankings and overall performance.

TimeEntry.Title: CSS Monthly Meeting With Mimi Johan and All Team
TimeEntry.Notes:
The website has undergone a thorough optimization to enhance its performance, user experience, and search engine visibility. Key improvements include the optimization of the XML sitemap, advanced caching for faster load times, image compression, and enhanced mobile responsiveness. Broken links have been repaired, and internal linking has been improved to optimize site structure and crawl efficiency. Critical functionalities, such as SMTP configuration, contact forms, and Google Tag Manager, have been properly set up to ensure accurate tracking and seamless communication.

Ongoing KPI monitoring focuses on essential metrics like page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and overall search visibility. Continuous technical SEO adjustments are being made, addressing crawl errors, refining site architecture, and enhancing indexing performance. A targeted growth strategy includes persona-based keyword optimization, the creation of high-quality SEO content, media optimization, and maintaining a consistent design approach.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush and HOTH SEO tools. Evaluated overall site health, analyzed keyword rankings, and assessed technical performance issues. Identified opportunities to improve on-page SEO, site speed, and mobile usability.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
website has undergone comprehensive optimization to enhance performance, user experience, and search engine visibility. Key improvements include XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching for faster load times, image compression, and enhanced mobile responsiveness. Broken links have been resolved, and internal linking has been strengthened to improve site structure and crawl efficiency.

Critical functionalities—such as SMTP configuration, contact forms, and Google Tag Manager—have been properly implemented to ensure reliable communication and accurate data tracking.

Ongoing KPI monitoring focuses on essential metrics, including page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and overall search visibility. Continuous technical SEO efforts are in place to identify and resolve crawl errors, refine site architecture, and improve indexing performance.

The growth strategy centers on persona-based keyword targeting, the creation of high-quality SEO content, media optimization, and maintaining a consistent, user-focused design approach—ensuring sustained performance and long-term scalability.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a detailed SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush and HOTH tools. Reviewed site health metrics, analyzed keyword rankings, and identified technical issues affecting performance. Evaluated on-page SEO elements, including meta tags and content structure. Enhance site speed, improve mobile usability, and optimize overall search visibility to drive better organic traffic and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
website has undergone comprehensive optimization to enhance performance, user experience, and search engine visibility. Key improvements include XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching for faster load times, image compression, enhanced mobile responsiveness, and updates to homepage content settings. Plugin updates were implemented to ensure compatibility, functionality, and improved site management.

Broken links have been resolved, and internal linking has been strengthened to improve site structure and crawl efficiency. Additionally, website speed settings have been fine-tuned to ensure rapid loading times across all devices and browsing environments.

Ongoing KPI monitoring focuses on essential metrics, including page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and overall search visibility. Continuous technical SEO efforts are in place to identify and resolve crawl errors, refine site architecture, and improve indexing performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3 (12 mo)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on fixing CSS errors to improve page load speed, optimizing styles and performance for a smoother user experience and faster page rendering.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
The website has undergone extensive optimization to boost performance, enhance user experience, and improve search engine visibility. Key upgrades include XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching for quicker load times, image compression, and better mobile responsiveness. Additionally, the homepage content settings have been updated, and plugins were upgraded to ensure compatibility, functionality, and easier site management.

Broken links have been fixed, and internal linking has been reinforced to optimize site structure and crawl efficiency. Website speed settings have also been fine-tuned to ensure fast loading across all devices and browsers.

  • Mobile settings have been updated to ensure seamless responsiveness across all devices.
  • Image settings have been optimized, improving load times without compromising quality.
  • Homepage content settings have been revised to enhance engagement and improve SEO.

Ongoing KPI monitoring focuses on essential metrics such as page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and search visibility. Continuous technical SEO efforts are being made to identify and resolve crawl errors, optimize site architecture, and enhance indexing performance.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush and HOTH tools. This included reviewing site health metrics, such as crawlability and technical issues, analyzing keyword rankings for SEO performance, and identifying opportunities for optimization. I also evaluated the website's on-page SEO factors and checked its speed using Google PageSpeed Insights, providing insights into areas for improvement. This audit aimed to enhance the website’s search visibility, user experience, and overall performance.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush and HOTH tools. Evaluated site health metrics including crawlability, indexing, page speed, broken links, and other technical issues affecting performance. Analyzed keyword rankings, search visibility, and competitor positioning to measure SEO effectiveness. Identified optimization opportunities and provided actionable recommendations to improve organic traffic, enhance user experience, and strengthen the website's overall search engine performance and digital presence.

TimeEntry.Title: CSS Monthly Meeting With Mimi Johan and All Team
TimeEntry.Notes:
Weekly CSS Progess Meeting WIth Mimi

Open questions

  • Explore options for authentic reviews without violating NDAs.
  • Research and share homepage template options before finalizing.
  • Clarify Cloudflare necessity and costs for tag management setup.
  • Research and decide on optimal cookie plugin for legal and tracking needs.

Technical issues and reporting

  • Puneet explained that the homepage has two designs, one for desktop and one for mobile, and clarified recent fixes made to the local schema and organization schema
  • Mimi emphasized the importance of focusing on technical issues as the foundation before addressing other website concerns
  • Mimi requested that Puneet provide more specific details about broken links, including exact URLs, to improve clarity in future reports.
  • Mimi requested a dedicated meeting to review all website issues before implementing changes, followed by a separate meeting to confirm resolutions.

Website content management

  • Mimi confirmed that only blogs approved by Jared are now posted, and unapproved blogs have been removed to prevent 404 errors.

Google Business Profile

  • Mimi discussed the challenge of obtaining client reviews due to industry NDAs and mentioned plans to ask a departing client or other employees for reviews.
  • Mimi confirmed that the Google Business Profile was already claimed and optimized, and clarified that increased traffic resulted from these efforts.
  • Puneet explained that the verification badge on the Google Business Profile requires video or photo verification, and acknowledged that only admins can see it.
  • Mimi demonstrated where to find the verification status and offered guidance to Puneet on accessing the Google Business Profile.
  • Puneet suggested updating the business description to include more keywords and services for better search visibility, and Mimi requested specific reasons and examples for these suggestions.
  • Mimi confirmed that multiple business categories, including "semiconductor supplier," were already added to the Google Business Profile.
  • Mimi explained that the Google Business Profile description was optimized using best practices and relevant keywords based on search queries and Google's recommendations.
  • Mimi confirmed that multiple business categories, including "semiconductor supplier," were already added to the Google Business Profile, and clarified the reasoning for not using "engineering consultant."
  • Mimi and Puneet discussed adding more external and event pictures to the Google Business Profile to enhance its visibility.

Google Business Profile management

  • Mimi and Puneet discussed updating the Google Business Profile description and business categories, and agreed to review and update as needed based on current data.
  • Mimi explained that the Google Business Profile content was developed using years of collected data and targeted keywords to attract the right audience.
  • Mimi clarified that the Google Business Profile content was developed using years of collected data and targeted keywords to attract the right audience.

Technical issues and fixes

  • Puneet explained that the homepage previously had duplicate H1 tags and confirmed that this issue was fixed in the latest report.
  • Mimi and Puneet discussed that previous fixes to homepage content repetition and H1 tag duplication were temporary and a permanent solution is needed.

Website security

  • Mimi and Puneet discussed adding Cloudflare Turnstile as an alternative to Google reCAPTCHA for improved website security.
  • Mimi and Puneet discussed that the SSL certificate is already installed and there is no need to purchase an additional one from Ionis or GoDaddy.

TimeEntry.Title: CSS Monthly Meeting With Mimi Johan and All Team
TimeEntry.Notes: Weekly Progess meeting With mimi For CSS Website SEO and Website issues

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
The website has undergone significant optimization to enhance performance, improve user experience, and boost search engine visibility. Key updates include the resolution of the HTTP/2 issue, fixes for local schema issues, and a solution to homepage-related problems, all of which contribute to a smoother experience for visitors.

In addition, XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching strategies, and image compression were implemented to accelerate load times and improve overall site speed. The mobile responsiveness has been fine-tuned to ensure a seamless experience across all devices.

Content updates were made to the homepage, including improvements to both the H1 and H2 tags for better SEO performance. Plugin upgrades have been completed to ensure compatibility, smooth functionality, and easier site management. Broken links have been fixed, and internal linking was enhanced to streamline site navigation and crawl efficiency.

Performance settings were optimized to ensure the site loads quickly across all browsers and devices. Image settings were adjusted for improved loading times without sacrificing quality.

Ongoing monitoring of key performance indicators (KPIs) is focused on critical metrics such as page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and search visibility. Continued technical SEO efforts are focused on resolving crawl errors, optimizing site structure, and improving indexing efficiency to ensure sustained long-term growth.

TimeEntry.Title: CSS Monthly Meeting With Mimi Johan and All Team
TimeEntry.Notes:
As discussed in our progress meeting, the next week's progress plan focuses on addressing several key areas of improvement. We need to work on fixing errors across the site, specifically targeting the homepage redesign and resolving issues with typography settings throughout the website. Additionally, we will be focusing on the Google Analytics setup, as there are issues with key event tracking, and it's showing incorrect data. Another priority is auditing Google Tag Manager to ensure that all tags are functioning properly and accurately tracking data.

Furthermore, the website's header, footer, and all CSS-related elements need attention to ensure consistency and alignment across the site. We'll also work on fixing any remaining errors in the settings to ensure smooth functionality across all sections of the site. These updates and fixes will be implemented systematically to ensure that the site performs optimally and all tracking systems are properly aligned.

All updates will be tracked and documented in the GitHub repository for visibility and transparency. Let’s ensure these issues are addressed by the next meeting to keep everything on track.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush and HOTH tools, analyzing site health, crawlability, indexing status, and page speed performance. check technical issues, and optimization gaps affecting search visibility. Provided actionable recommendations to improve on-page SEO, metadata, site structure, and loading times, ultimately enhancing user experience, search rankings, and overall digital performance while aligning strategies with SEO best practices and industry standards.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
Website has been further enhanced with the addition of font size customization settings, implemented in line with Mimi’s instructions to improve accessibility and user control.

Alongside this, the site has undergone extensive optimization to strengthen performance, user experience, and search engine visibility. Key technical improvements include resolving the HTTP/2 issue, fixing local schema errors, and addressing homepage-related concerns, all contributing to a smoother and more reliable browsing experience.

Performance has been significantly improved through XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching mechanisms, and image compression, resulting in faster load times and better overall site speed. Mobile responsiveness has also been refined to ensure a consistent and seamless experience across all devices.

On the SEO front, homepage content has been optimized with improved H1 and H2 tag structures to enhance search performance. Plugin updates have been carried out to maintain compatibility, ensure smooth functionality, and simplify ongoing site management.

Additional improvements include fixing broken links and strengthening internal linking, which helps improve navigation and crawl efficiency. Image settings have been optimized to balance quality and speed, while overall performance configurations ensure fast loading across different browsers and devices.

Ongoing monitoring of key performance indicators (KPIs) focuses on essential metrics such as page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and search visibility. Continuous technical SEO efforts are in place to resolve crawl is

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3 (12 mo)
TimeEntry.Notes: Sorted SEO technical issues and worked on creating a detailed report for CSS, addressing performance optimizations, error fixes, and enhancing search engine visibility to improve overall website ranking and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3 (12 mo)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on resolving website issues and optimized meta tags and heading tags for CSS, enhancing SEO, improving site structure, and boosting search engine visibility for better performance and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a thorough SEO audit for the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush and HOTH tools. The audit involved analyzing key aspects such as site health, crawlability, indexing status, and page speed performance. I identified technical issues, provided optimization recommendations, and assessed the website’s overall SEO performance to enhance visibility and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes: The website has been further enhanced with the addition of Tustin Reachpath in contact forms and font size customization settings, implemented to improve accessibility and user control, following Mimi’s instructions. Extensive optimizations have been made to strengthen performance, user experience, and search engine visibility. Key technical improvements include resolving the HTTP/2 issue, fixing local schema errors, and addressing homepage-related concerns, resulting in a smoother and more reliable browsing experience. Performance has been significantly boosted through XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching mechanisms, and image compression, ensuring faster load times and improved site speed. Mobile responsiveness has also been refined to deliver a seamless experience across all devices. On the SEO front, homepage content has been optimized with improved H1 and H2 tag structures, plugin updates have been carried out for compatibility and smooth functionality, and ongoing monitoring focuses on KPIs like page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and search visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes: The website was further enhanced with the integration of Tustin ReachPath into contact forms and the addition of font-size customization settings to improve accessibility and user control, as per Mimi’s instructions, along with the creation of a new custom HTML homepage design and updated homepage content for a more modern and engaging experience. Extensive technical and SEO optimizations were carried out, including resolving the HTTP/2 issue, fixing local schema errors, and addressing homepage-related concerns to ensure smoother functionality. Performance was significantly improved through XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching, and image compression, resulting in faster load times and better site speed, while mobile responsiveness was refined to provide a seamless experience across all devices. Additionally, homepage SEO was strengthened with improved H1 and H2 tag structure, plugins and settings were updated for compatibility and efficiency, and ongoing monitoring was implemented to track key performance indicators such as page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and search visibility, ensuring a faster, more accessible, and search-friendly website overall.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a comprehensive SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush, identifying key technical issues impacting performance. Detected unminified JavaScript and CSS files contributing to slower page load times and reduced user experience. findings and prioritized optimization opportunities to enhance site speed, improve search engine rankings, and ensure better overall website performance and accessibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3 (12 mo)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on optimizing meta tags, resolving internal linking issues, and fixing image alt attributes for CSS, improving SEO performance, accessibility, site structure, and overall user experience and search engine visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed the existing CSS of the website to assess design structure, styling consistency, and responsiveness. Identified areas for improvement and optimization. Based on client requirements, planned the layout and structure for a new webpage, ensuring alignment with branding, user experience goals, and modern design standards for effective implementation.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3 (12 mo)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on CSS-related on-page issues by improving styling, fixing layout inconsistencies, optimizing responsiveness, and enhancing user experience, while also preparing and updating the weekly report to track progress and performance.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted an SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush, identifying key technical issues impacting site performance, indexing, and search visibility. The audit involved analyzing the site’s structure, metadata, and page speed to uncover areas for optimization. Critical issues such as broken links, slow load times, and improper metadata were pinpointed, with actionable recommendations provided to enhance overall search engine performance and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
The website was further enhanced with the integration of Tustin ReachPath into contact forms, along with the addition of font-size customization settings to improve accessibility and user control, as per Mimi’s instructions. A new custom HTML homepage was designed and implemented, accompanied by updated homepage content to create a more modern and engaging user experience.

Extensive technical and SEO optimizations were carried out, including resolving the HTTP/2 issue, fixing local schema errors, and addressing key homepage concerns to ensure smoother functionality. Performance was significantly improved through XML sitemap optimization, advanced caching, and image compression, resulting in faster load times and enhanced overall site speed. Mobile responsiveness was also refined to ensure a seamless experience across all devices.

In addition, plugin configurations, backup settings, and notification systems were updated to improve site reliability, security, and monitoring. All plugins were reviewed and updated for better compatibility and performance. Homepage SEO was strengthened with an improved H1 and H2 tag structure, while ongoing monitoring was implemented to track key performance indicators such as page speed, crawl health, traffic quality, user engagement, and search visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
I integrated Tustin ReachPath into the website’s contact forms and implemented font-size customization features to improve accessibility based on recommended guidelines. I also designed and launched a new custom HTML homepage, along with updating the content to provide a more modern and engaging user experience.

In addition, I carried out technical and SEO optimizations, including fixing the HTTPS issue on the test site, resolving schema errors, and addressing homepage-related issues. I improved site performance through XML sitemap optimization, caching strategies, and image compression, while also refining mobile responsiveness. I updated plugin configurations, backups, and notification systems, reviewed and updated all plugins for compatibility, enhanced homepage SEO with better heading structure, and established ongoing monitoring for performance and SEO metrics.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush, uncovering critical technical issues affecting site performance and search visibility. Identified problems related to crawlability, indexing, broken links, and page speed. Analyzed on-page SEO elements, metadata, and keyword optimization.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed the SCC website thoroughly, identifying and analyzing any errors or issues affecting functionality. Conducted a detailed search for potential bugs, broken links, or performance issues. After evaluating the overall website experience, I addressed and resolved the identified errors to ensure a smooth, error-free user experience across all pages.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3 (12 mo)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on optimizing image alt attributes and internal linking for CSS, improving accessibility, SEO, and site navigation to enhance user experience and search engine visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush,check site performance and search visibility. The audit included an in-depth analysis of key metrics such as site speed, mobile optimization, broken links, and on-page SEO factors enhance the site's overall user experience, resolve technical errors, and improve search engine rankings.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes:
I integrated ReachPath into the website’s contact forms and added font-size customization features to enhance accessibility, following recommended guidelines. Additionally, I designed and launched a new custom HTML homepage with updated content, providing a more modern and engaging user experience.

I also implemented technical and SEO optimizations, resolving the HTTPS issue on the test site, fixing schema errors, and addressing homepage-related problems. Site performance was improved through XML sitemap optimization, caching strategies, and image compression, while mobile responsiveness was refined. I updated plugin configurations, backups, and notification systems, reviewed all plugins for compatibility, enhanced homepage SEO with improved heading structure, and set up ongoing monitoring for performance and SEO metrics.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: For the SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush, I will analyze its overall performance, including key metrics like site speed, mobile usability, and backlinks. review search visibility, keyword rankings, and organic traffic to assess how well the site performs in search engines. Additionally, check SEO and low-ranking pages, and provide recommendations for improvement.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes: I integrated ReachPath into the website’s contact forms and added font-size customization features to enhance accessibility, following recommended guidelines. Additionally, I designed and launched a new custom HTML homepage with updated content, providing a more modern and engaging user experience. I also implemented technical and SEO optimizations, resolving the HTTPS issue on the test site, fixing schema errors, and addressing homepage-related problems. Site performance was improved through XML sitemap optimization, caching strategies, and image compression, while mobile responsiveness was refined. I updated plugin configurations, backups, and notification systems, reviewed all plugins for compatibility, enhanced homepage SEO with improved heading structure, and set up ongoing monitoring for performance and SEO metrics to ensure continued improvements and stability.

TimeEntry.Title: SEO Optimization :Keyword & SERP Research
TimeEntry.Notes: For the SEO audit of the Custom Silicon Solutions website using SEMrush, overall performance by focusing on key metrics such as site speed, mobile usability, on-page SEO elements, and technical SEO factors. This includes evaluating load times, mobile responsiveness, crawl errors, and keyword rankings. identify any issues affecting user experience or search engine visibility, providing actionable insights to optimize the site for better performance and search engine rankings.

TimeEntry.Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
TimeEntry.Notes: The website has been successfully revamped with a mobile-first design, ensuring a seamless and consistent user experience across smartphones, tablets, and desktops. A comprehensive SEO audit was conducted to improve crawlability, indexing, and overall site structure, boosting visibility on search engines. Performance optimizations, including advanced caching techniques, XML sitemap optimization, and image compression, resulted in faster load times and improved Core Web Vitals. Additionally, technical issues, such as broken links, schema errors, and performance bottlenecks, were addressed to ensure a smoother browsing experience. To enhance accessibility, I integrated ReachPath into the website’s contact forms and added font-size customization features. A new custom HTML homepage was designed and launched with updated content, providing a modern and engaging user experience. The blog content was also optimized with better meta tags, stronger internal linking, and improved image SEO. I also created a dedicated test site at css.technijian.com, where I fixed HTTPS issues, resolved homepage-related problems, and reviewed plugin configurations for compatibility.
